GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 12 of 1981
Date of Assent: 5th April, 1981
An Act to authorise expenditure from the general re-.
venues of the Republic of the moneys required for
the services of the Republic during the :financial year
ending on the 31st December, 1981, not exceeding in
the aggregate, eight hundred and seventy million, one
hundred and fifty-five thousand, two _hund,re.d ·and
eleven kwacha.
[10th, April, 1981
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia:
,Enaotment
1. This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 1981. Short titlo
2. (l) On the authority of a warrant issued by tho Pi·esident, Appropria­
there may be expended from the general revenues of the tion
Republic such moneys, not exceeding in the aggrngate, eight•
hundred and seventy million, one hundred and fifty-five
thousand, two hundred and eleven kwacha, as may bo re­
quired for the services of the Republic during the financial
year ending on the 31st December, 1981.
(2) '!.'he moneys mentioned in subsection ( 1) shall be appro­
priated to the services of the Republic mentioned in the second
colunm of the Schedule in amounts not ·exceeding the amounts
·
indicated in the third column thereof.
(3) On the written authority of the P�rmanent Secretary,
Ministry of Finance, the amounts shown under tho sub-heads
of the estimates may be varied:
Provided-
(i) the amounts appropriated to each Head shall not
thereby be altered; and
(ii) any of the amounts shown under Head 320 or 321 shall
not be varied.
Single copies of this Act may be obtainedJ ro,n, tho Governme"ne Printer,
P.O. Bo:,; 30136, Lwlalra. Price 20n. · · "
